positive: A whimsical digital painting of a bioluminescent fox sitting in a glowing, misty forest clearing. The style is hyper-detailed fantasy art, featuring glowing flora, soft volumetric lighting, and deep jewel tones. Concept art, intricate details, Greg Rutkowski style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, poorly rendered paws, photographic, cartoon, sketch
